summary: Create Account Error - invalid email and password format
description:
GIVEN the user is not logged in
AND TTS is turned ON
AND the user is on the Create Free Account page

steps.action:
WHEN the user enters an invalid email format into the "Email Address" field
AND the user enters an invalid password format into the "Password" field
AND the user selects the "Create Account" button
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "We encountered an issue while trying to create your account. Your email address is in the incorrect format. Your email address must be in the format of name<at>domain<dot>com. Your password is in the incorrect format. Use 8-15 characters with one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter and one number."
